name: Vendor Dispatch Offer Lifecycle
description: Prepare vendor eligibility, staged offer waves, response handling, and audit notes for maintenance dispatch.

stages.name: Qualify Vendor Pool
stages.description: Build an eligible vendor list before any offer is released.

steps.title: Classify dispatch requirements
steps.instructions: Classify trade, urgency, location constraints, access needs, SLA target, required documents, and owner approval threshold.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal dispatch requirements and constraints.

steps.title: Build eligible vendor pool
steps.instructions: Build a ranked eligible vendor pool using trade fit, service area, compliance state, workload, recent performance, and exclusion flags.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare ranked vendor pool for dispatch offer staging.

stages.name: Stage Offer Lifecycle
stages.description: Prepare first-wave and fallback offer handling while preserving outbound approval gates.

steps.title: Stage first offer wave
steps.instructions: Stage first-wave offer text, expiration window, acceptance instructions, and idempotency key. Keep send gated to the configured outbound approval path.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare first offer wave; do not send externally.

steps.title: Offer release gate
steps.instructions: Approve the staged offer wave or return for edits before any vendor-facing release.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before vendor offer release.

steps.title: Stage fallback wave
steps.instructions: Stage fallback offer rules for no response, decline, expired offer, or vendor disqualification cases.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare fallback vendor offer rules and timing.

stages.name: Award And Audit
stages.description: Capture accepted offer state and record the dispatch audit trail.

steps.title: Capture offer outcome
steps.instructions: Capture accepted, declined, expired, or escalated offer state with timestamps, actor/source, and selected vendor details.
steps.dispatch_body: Record vendor offer outcome and dispatch state.

steps.title: Record dispatch audit
steps.instructions: Record eligibility rationale, offer sequence, selected vendor, exceptions, and next monitoring checkpoint in the workflow event trail.
steps.dispatch_body: Record vendor offer lifecycle audit details.
